reasoning: The baseline price is $129.07 as of Friday, June 6, 2025. Following strict instructions, my probabilities decay closer to 0.5 uncertainty as the time horizon extends. Specifically, the latter dates (September 6 and December 5) carry additional downside risk purely due to stock mechanics: KMB's historical ex-dividend schedule typically lands on or around roughly September 5 and December 5, meaning the stock will likely suffer technical ~$1.26 price drops exactly on the Q3 and Q4 resolution dates. This structural disadvantage, coupled with increasing temporal uncertainty, warrants pulling the more distant forecasts rapidly down toward 0.50.
